description: Canonical idea incubator — all ideas, bugs, and improvement requests before GATE_0 entry

fate_legend.new_wp: Becomes its own work package (S-P-WP assigned)
fate_legend.append: Added to existing WP scope or tracking item
fate_legend.immediate: Executed directly (< 1 session, no new WP)
fate_legend.cancel: Not pursuing — reason logged to prevent recurrence

ideas.title: Standalone PIPELINE_HELP.html — dedicated help page (Option B)
ideas.fate_rationale: Option A (modal upgrade) handled immediately. Option B requires dedicated UX design and LOD200 — backlog for S003-P007
ideas.notes: S003-P007 registry already notes this as backlog candidate per session 2026-03-15

ideas.title: PIPELINE_TEAMS.html update — Process-Functional separation + Team 10 Mode 1/2/3
ideas.fate_rationale: Mandate issued to Team 30. Roadmap-integration item (not blocking).

ideas.title: AOS Docs Audit — standing governance thread (Teams 170+190 joint)
ideas.fate_rationale: Standing governance process triggered by pipeline code changes. Priority 2A immediate: activation prompt updates per Process-Functional Separation.
ideas.notes: Not a WP — ongoing responsibility. 2A immediate, 2B targeted scan, 2C monthly

ideas.title: `insist` command implementation verification (pipeline_run.sh)
ideas.fate_rationale: Design includes `insist` command but no AC coverage. Team 61 must confirm implementation status before GATE_7 sign-off.
ideas.notes: OBS-02 in GATE_6 decision. If not implemented: < 15 lines, implement + re-QA by Team 51

ideas.title: Mode 1 Routing Table document (TEAM_10_MODE1_ROUTING_TABLE)
ideas.fate_target: AOS Docs Audit mandate — Team 170 deliverable
ideas.fate_rationale: Team 170 to author deterministic routing table for Mode 1 per Process-Functional Separation ADR. Team 00 approves after.

ideas.title: Clear residual override_reason in pipeline_state_agentsos.json before WP002 GATE_8
ideas.fate_rationale: override_reason: 'Nimrod approved expedited close' is residual test data from WP002 expedited close verification. Must be null before GATE_8 for clean state.
ideas.notes: Team 61 to clear as part of GATE_7 preparation

ideas.title: Ideas Pipeline Phase 2 — grooming automation, UI fate-decision interface
ideas.fate_rationale: Phase 1 (this session) provides stable base. Phase 2 adds: idea_groom.sh, UI fate decisions in dashboard, dedup warnings, registry auto-integration. WP004 (not WP003) per program registry update — WP003 slot taken by PIPELINE_TEAMS.html update mandate.
ideas.notes: Trigger: S002-P005-WP002 GATE_8 PASS. LOD200 required before GATE_0.

ideas.title: Help modal 4-tab upgrade — Option A immediate (context banner, Three Modes, domain section)
ideas.fate_rationale: Mandate issued to Team 61. 15 ACs. 4-tab modal replacing current flat structure.

ideas.title: Process-Functional Separation — formalize as ADR and lock Team 10 role evolution
ideas.fate_rationale: Core architectural principle: functional teams output verdict only, no owner_next_action. Team 10 role differs across three modes. Both ADRs authored and locked this session.
ideas.notes: Team 10 Mode 1=Process Coordinator+Impl; Mode 2=Impl Technical Authority only; Mode 3=Tech Consultation on-demand

ideas.title: Domain guard architecture — validate `PipelineState.load()` priority logic is correct
ideas.fate_rationale: Reviewed domain guard: explicit arg > PIPELINE_DOMAIN env > auto-detect (1 active→auto, 2+ active→sys.exit(1), 0 active→legacy). Architecture confirmed correct — no patches needed.
ideas.notes: Iron Rule: test isolation requires monkeypatch of get_state_file + STATE_FILE + PIPELINE_DOMAIN env

ideas.title: WP001 state anomaly — current_gate=WAITING_GATE2_APPROVAL but GATE_2 in gates_completed
ideas.fate_rationale: WP001 state anomaly (WAITING_GATE2_APPROVAL vs GATE_2 in gates_completed) is moot. Canonical pipeline state confirmed restored to S002-P005-WP002 at GATE_8 (last_updated: 2026-03-10 — the March 10 expedited close). WP002 is GATE_8 PASS / DOCUMENTATION_CLOSED per program registry. WP001 is fully superseded. No investigation needed.
ideas.notes: State at session discovery: WP001/WAITING_GATE2_APPROVAL/override_reason set. State after team restoration: WP002/GATE_8/override_reason=null. Canonical state confirmed. Anomaly was residual from session-start corruption, not a real inconsistency in the canonical record.

ideas.title: Ideas Pipeline Phase 1 — IDEA_LOG + scripts + dashboard tab (this session)
ideas.fate_target: Implemented directly by Team 00 this session
ideas.fate_rationale: Nimrod approved direct implementation. PHOENIX_IDEA_LOG.json + idea_submit.sh + idea_scan.sh + PIPELINE_ROADMAP.html update + CLAUDE.md update.
ideas.notes: Implementing directly because: Nimrod explicitly requested direct implementation (CLAUDE.md exception #3)

ideas.title: test_injection known failures — tracking note required (OBS-03 from WP002 GATE_6)
ideas.fate_rationale: 2 known test_injection failures. Team 61 to submit nature + acceptance rationale + future fix plan before GATE_7 sign-off.

ideas.title: store_artifact() silent failure fix (AO2-STORE-001) + help-text mismatch (AO2-STORE-002)
ideas.fate_rationale: Both issues fixed by Team 61: store_artifact()->bool with sys.exit(1), help-text corrected. pytest 15/15 PASS. WP001 CLOSED.

ideas.title: Team 10 activation notice for WP002 GATE_7 — needs to be written and sent
ideas.fate_rationale: Activation document authored by Team 100 (delegated by Nimrod). Team 10 directed to advance WSM to GATE_7 + activate Nimrod UX review.
ideas.notes: ⚠️ SUPERSEDED: GATE_7 activation doc was written based on session-start state showing WP002 at GATE_6. Canonical state (restored 2026-03-10) shows WP002 already at GATE_8 PASS DOCUMENTATION_CLOSED. Activation doc superseded by ARCHITECT_IDEA_PIPELINE_PHASE1_APPROVAL_v1.0.0.md context note. GATE_7 was completed in the March 10 expedited close cycle.
